narrative:
Locust Grove (precinct in Adams County) has 740 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
